pr_title: SDLC-67: Fix inflated available seat count on flight details
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the backend seat availability calculation so flight details report available seats as `total_seats - booked_seats` instead of the inflated `total_seats + booked_seats` result.

## Changes
- Correct the availability arithmetic in `backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py` (`seat_inventory_counts`)
- Add/adjust regression coverage for flight details seat availability

## Validation
- Targeted tests for seat inventory and flight details
- Regression assertion that available seats never exceed aircraft capacity

## Notes
- Change is intentionally localized and preserves the existing API/data model shape.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
